mapper.insert: insert into article(title, users_no, content, reg_date, view_cnt, is_article) values (#{title}, #{usersNo}, #{content}, #{regDate}, #{viewCnt}, #{isArticle})
mapper.update: update article set title=#{title}, content=#{content}, is_article=#{isArticle} where no=#{no}
mapper.select: select a.*, u.name from article a join users u on u.no = a.users_no where a.no=#{no}
select a.*, u.name from article a join users u on u.no = a.users_no order by a.is_article asc, a.no asc
select a.*, u.name from article a join users u on u.no = a.users_no where a.is_article = 1 order by a.no desc limit 3
